titleStmt.title: SII 40.184: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 184. (A.R. No. B. 319 of 1931.) Śrīgripāḍu, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab lying in a field to the east of the village.
This is dated Śaka 1220, Viḷaṁbi, Vaiśākha, śu. 15, Thursday, lunar eclipse, corresponding to 1298 A.D., April 27. However the weekday was Sunday.
Records the gift of pandūmu of land in the village Chalaguḍipādu by Pulipāṭi Goṅkināyaniṅgāru for the welfare of the king and for the merit of Māchaya-Nāyaka on the occasion of lunar eclipse.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śakavaruśaṁbulu 12
20 Agunēṁṭi viḷaṁbi saṁva
tsaravaiśākha su 15 gu nāṁṭi
caṁdragrahaṇa kāla
ṁnappuḍu svasti śrīma
nmahāmaṁḍalēśvara
kākatiyya pratāpa rudra
mahārājulakuna
bhivriddhigānu mācaya
nāyaniṁgāriki puṇya
mugānu pulipāṭi goṁ
kināyuniṁgāru ca
laguḍipāṭi dhaṁ¨rmmagā
ḍiki beṭṭina vritti bōya
palli kāllēru Uttaraṁga ṟa
kicēnu paṁdumu
na 10 Ācaṁdrā¨rkasthāI
gānu Iccēnu 7 svadattāṁ pa
radattaṁ vā yō harēti
vasuṁdharā . śaṣṭi¨rva¨rṣa saha
srāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jā
yatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 40.184 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
